message:
chore(beads): close ntm-952.2.3 (What next success footers)

Marks the success footer task as complete.
Implementation adds SuccessFooter helpers and integrates them
into spawn and quick commands.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

 {"id":"ntm-952.2","title":"SUB-EPIC: CLI Copy & Error Remediation","description":"Focus: CLI output that’s clear, actionable, and consistent.

Deliverables:
- Standard error format (cause → fix → next command)
- Better session selection/resolution when args omitted
- Consistent “what next” guidance after major commands","design":"## Error copy contract
Every error should include:
1) **What failed** (command + target)
2) **Why** (root cause in plain language)
3) **What to do next** (one concrete command)

## Session resolution contract
When a session argument is missing:
- Prefer deterministic inference (cwd → project/session mapping).
- If ambiguous, show an interactive chooser.
- Always echo the chosen session explicitly.

## Avoid
- One-off flags per command.
- Huge stack traces by default.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"epic","created_at":"2025-12-12T12:33:24.767463221-06:00","updated_at":"2025-12-12T12:40:48.862410571-06:00","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"ntm-952.2","depends_on_id":"ntm-952","type":"parent-child","created_at":"0001-01-01T00:00:00Z","created_by":""}]}
 {"id":"ntm-952.2.1","title":"CLI: Standardize error format + remediation hints","description":"Make all CLI errors follow a consistent structure: what failed, why, and the fastest next command to fix it.","acceptance_criteria":"- Errors include cause + suggested fix\n- Output remains readable in both color and no-color modes\n- Exit codes remain correct","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"LilacStone","estimated_minutes":120,"created_at":"2025-12-12T12:36:31.362365323-06:00","updated_at":"2025-12-12T13:19:02.863364677-06:00","closed_at":"2025-12-12T13:19:02.863364677-06:00","labels":["ux","cli"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"ntm-952.2.1","depends_on_id":"ntm-952.2","type":"parent-child","created_at":"0001-01-01T00:00:00Z","created_by":""}]}
 {"id":"ntm-952.2.2","title":"CLI: Session inference + interactive chooser when omitted","description":"When the session argument is omitted, infer intelligently (cwd/project) and fall back to an interactive chooser instead of hard-failing.","acceptance_criteria":"- Uses a single, shared session-resolution algorithm across commands\n- If multiple candidates exist, presents a chooser with clear defaults\n- Clearly explains which session was selected and why","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","estimated_minutes":180,"created_at":"2025-12-12T12:36:31.41121191-06:00","updated_at":"2025-12-12T12:36:31.41121191-06:00","labels":["ux","cli"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"ntm-952.2.2","depends_on_id":"ntm-952.2","type":"parent-child","created_at":"0001-01-01T00:00:00Z","created_by":""},{"issue_id":"ntm-952.2.2","depends_on_id":"ntm-4ji","type":"blocks","created_at":"0001-01-01T00:00:00Z","created_by":""},{"issue_id":"ntm-952.2.2","depends_on_id":"ntm-bke.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"0001-01-01T00:00:00Z","created_by":""}]}
-{"id":"ntm-952.2.3","title":"CLI: Add 'What next' success footers for major commands","description":"After successful commands like spawn/quick/attach, print a short next-step footer that nudges users into the intended workflow.","acceptance_criteria":"- Success output includes 1-3 next commands (dashboard/palette/send)\n- Messaging is concise and skimmable\n- Can be disabled in robot/terse mode","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","estimated_minutes":90,"created_at":"2025-12-12T12:36:31.507544927-06:00","updated_at":"2025-12-12T12:36:31.507544927-06:00","labels":["ux","cli"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"ntm-952.2.3","depends_on_id":"ntm-952.2","type":"parent-child","created_at":"0001-01-01T00:00:00Z","created_by":""}]}
+{"id":"ntm-952.2.3","title":"CLI: Add 'What next' success footers for major commands","description":"After successful commands like spawn/quick/attach, print a short next-step footer that nudges users into the intended workflow.","acceptance_criteria":"- Success output includes 1-3 next commands (dashboard/palette/send)\n- Messaging is concise and skimmable\n- Can be disabled in robot/terse mode","status":"closed","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"LilacStone","estimated_minutes":90,"created_at":"2025-12-12T12:36:31.507544927-06:00","updated_at":"2025-12-12T13:25:56.505450574-06:00","closed_at":"2025-12-12T13:25:56.505450574-06:00","labels":["ux","cli"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"ntm-952.2.3","depends_on_id":"ntm-952.2","type":"parent-child","created_at":"0001-01-01T00:00:00Z","created_by":""}]}
 {"id":"ntm-952.2.4","title":"CLI: Standard progress patterns for long operations","description":"Unify progress messaging (steps/spinner) for long operations (quick, upgrade, spawn) so users trust the tool and understand what's happening.","acceptance_criteria":"- Long ops show step-oriented progress\n- Failures show which step failed and suggested recovery\n- No noisy logs by default","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","estimated_minutes":120,"created_at":"2025-12-12T12:36:31.556823697-06:00","updated_at":"2025-12-12T12:36:31.556823697-06:00","labels":["ux","cli"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"ntm-952.2.4","depends_on_id":"ntm-952.2","type":"parent-child","created_at":"0001-01-01T00:00:00Z","created_by":""}]}
 {"id":"ntm-952.3","title":"SUB-EPIC: Command Palette Premium","description":"Focus: command palette that feels fast, obvious, and delightful.

Deliverables:
- Recents/favorites/pinning
- Crystal-clear target selection (who will receive this?)
- Preview that reduces misfires (metadata, warnings)
- Help overlay and consistent navigation","design":"## Palette = “fast path”
The palette should be the fastest way to:
- pick a vetted prompt
- choose recipients confidently
- send with minimal risk of misfire

## Premium feel comes from
- Recents/favorites (reduces re-searching)
- Clear recipient preview (reduces uncertainty)
- Stable filtering (no jumpy list)
- Help overlay (no docs required)

## Persistence
Prefer using existing config mechanisms (global + project), not inventing new storage.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"epic","created_at":"2025-12-12T12:33:24.793248034-06:00","updated_at":"2025-12-12T12:40:48.893976239-06:00","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"ntm-952.3","depends_on_id":"ntm-952","type":"parent-child","created_at":"0001-01-01T00:00:00Z","created_by":""}]}
 {"id":"ntm-952.3.1","title":"Palette: Recents, favorites, and pinning","description":"Add recents/favorites/pinning to make the palette feel like a power tool (less re-searching, fewer repeat mistakes).","acceptance_criteria":"- Recents list updates automatically\n- Favorites/pins are persisted\n- Works for both global and project palettes","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","estimated_minutes":180,"created_at":"2025-12-12T12:36:55.066500362-06:00","updated_at":"2025-12-12T12:36:55.066500362-06:00","labels":["ux","tui","palette"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"ntm-952.3.1","depends_on_id":"ntm-952.3","type":"parent-child","created_at":"0001-01-01T00:00:00Z","created_by":""},{"issue_id":"ntm-952.3.1","depends_on_id":"ntm-bke.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"0001-01-01T00:00:00Z","created_by":""}]}
@@ -144,7 +144,7 @@
 {"id":"ntm-952.5","title":"SUB-EPIC: Accessibility & Terminal Compatibility","description":"Focus: accessibility and terminal compatibility.

Deliverables:
- Reduced-motion mode (no shimmer/pulse)
- Safer icon and width fallbacks (no broken gutters)
- Better contrast defaults and an escape hatch for low-color terminals","design":"## Terminal constraints
We can’t rely on:
- Nerd Fonts
- good color support
- wide panes
- low-latency refresh

So accessibility is largely about **fallbacks** and **stability**.

## Reduced motion
Make it easy to disable shimmer/pulse (including for CI snapshots).

## No-color
Honor NO_COLOR and avoid relying on color alone to convey meaning.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"epic","created_at":"2025-12-12T12:33:24.84566752-06:00","updated_at":"2025-12-12T12:40:48.955632272-06:00","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"ntm-952.5","depends_on_id":"ntm-952","type":"parent-child","created_at":"0001-01-01T00:00:00Z","created_by":""}]}
 {"id":"ntm-952.5.1","title":"A11y: Reduced motion mode","description":"Add a reduced-motion mode that disables shimmer/pulse animations and prefers stable rendering for sensitive users and low-quality terminals.","acceptance_criteria":"- Env/config toggle exists (e.g., NTM_REDUCE_MOTION=1)\n- Pulse/shimmer animations are disabled\n- Layout remains stable without animation artifacts","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","estimated_minutes":120,"created_at":"2025-12-12T12:37:43.184262642-06:00","updated_at":"2025-12-12T13:17:29.879823589-06:00","closed_at":"2025-12-12T13:17:29.879823589-06:00","labels":["ux","a11y","tui"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"ntm-952.5.1","depends_on_id":"ntm-952.5","type":"parent-child","created_at":"0001-01-01T00:00:00Z","created_by":""},{"issue_id":"ntm-952.5.1","depends_on_id":"ntm-ube","type":"blocks","created_at":"0001-01-01T00:00:00Z","created_by":""}]}
 {"id":"ntm-952.5.2","title":"A11y: No-color / plain-output mode","description":"Support no-color/plain output for users who need maximum legibility or are piping output (honor NO_COLOR and provide NTM overrides).","acceptance_criteria":"- NO_COLOR is respected\n- CLI outputs remain clear without ANSI\n- TUIs avoid unreadable low-contrast combinations","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","estimated_minutes":120,"created_at":"2025-12-12T12:37:43.259194282-06:00","updated_at":"2025-12-12T12:37:43.259194282-06:00","labels":["ux","a11y","cli"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"ntm-952.5.2","depends_on_id":"ntm-952.5","type":"parent-child","created_at":"0001-01-01T00:00:00Z","created_by":""}]}
-{"id":"ntm-952.5.3","title":"A11y: Icon fallback audit + stable widths","description":"Audit icon usage across TUIs to ensure nerd/unicode/ascii fallbacks never break gutters, alignment, or width calculations.","acceptance_criteria":"- Every icon has a stable-width fallback\n- Narrow terminals don't drift/misalign\n- Rendering remains deterministic across icon sets","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","estimated_minutes":120,"created_at":"2025-12-12T12:37:43.310826122-06:00","updated_at":"2025-12-12T12:37:43.310826122-06:00","labels":["ux","a11y","tui"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"ntm-952.5.3","depends_on_id":"ntm-952.5","type":"parent-child","created_at":"0001-01-01T00:00:00Z","created_by":""},{"issue_id":"ntm-952.5.3","depends_on_id":"ntm-ci35","type":"blocks","created_at":"0001-01-01T00:00:00Z","created_by":""}]}
+{"id":"ntm-952.5.3","title":"A11y: Icon fallback audit + stable widths","description":"Audit icon usage across TUIs to ensure nerd/unicode/ascii fallbacks never break gutters, alignment, or width calculations.","acceptance_criteria":"- Every icon has a stable-width fallback\n- Narrow terminals don't drift/misalign\n- Rendering remains deterministic across icon sets","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","estimated_minutes":120,"created_at":"2025-12-12T12:37:43.310826122-06:00","updated_at":"2025-12-12T13:25:16.989861682-06:00","labels":["ux","a11y","tui"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"ntm-952.5.3","depends_on_id":"ntm-952.5","type":"parent-child","created_at":"0001-01-01T00:00:00Z","created_by":""},{"issue_id":"ntm-952.5.3","depends_on_id":"ntm-ci35","type":"blocks","created_at":"0001-01-01T00:00:00Z","created_by":""}]}
 {"id":"ntm-952.5.4","title":"A11y: Contrast audit + guard rails","description":"Audit theme contrast and add guard rails for low-color terminals (better defaults + an escape hatch).","acceptance_criteria":"- Contrast improves in critical UI areas (selection, errors, warnings)\n- Themes remain legible across light/dark backgrounds\n- Documented escape hatch for low-color terminals","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","estimated_minutes":150,"created_at":"2025-12-12T12:37:43.384648491-06:00","updated_at":"2025-12-12T12:37:43.384648491-06:00","labels":["ux","a11y","theme"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"ntm-952.5.4","depends_on_id":"ntm-952.5","type":"parent-child","created_at":"0001-01-01T00:00:00Z","created_by":""},{"issue_id":"ntm-952.5.4","depends_on_id":"ntm-ube","type":"blocks","created_at":"0001-01-01T00:00:00Z","created_by":""}]}
 {"id":"ntm-952.6","title":"SUB-EPIC: Performance & Responsiveness","description":"Focus: responsiveness and reliability.

Deliverables:
- Refresh budgets and caching (avoid expensive tmux capture loops)
- Graceful degradation when tmux data is missing/slow
- Debug affordances for diagnosing “why is this slow?”","design":"## Performance philosophy
Do less work by default:
- cache tmux captures
- coalesce refreshes
- cap line budgets

## Measure
When possible, surface timing/latency in an opt-in debug view. It’s hard to polish what you can’t observe.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"epic","created_at":"2025-12-12T12:33:24.871798196-06:00","updated_at":"2025-12-12T12:40:48.986947614-06:00","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"ntm-952.6","depends_on_id":"ntm-952","type":"parent-child","created_at":"0001-01-01T00:00:00Z","created_by":""}]}
 {"id":"ntm-952.6.1","title":"Perf: Refresh budgets + per-panel caching","description":"Introduce refresh budgets and caching so dashboards/palettes stay responsive even with many panes (avoid expensive tmux capture storms).","acceptance_criteria":"- Configurable refresh intervals exist\n- Expensive captures are cached/coalesced\n- Large sessions remain responsive","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","estimated_minutes":180,"created_at":"2025-12-12T12:38:01.385608071-06:00","updated_at":"2025-12-12T12:38:01.385608071-06:00","labels":["ux","perf","tui"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"ntm-952.6.1","depends_on_id":"ntm-952.6","type":"parent-child","created_at":"0001-01-01T00:00:00Z","created_by":""},{"issue_id":"ntm-952.6.1","depends_on_id":"ntm-0c8q","type":"blocks","created_at":"0001-01-01T00:00:00Z","created_by":""}]}
